title: F1 Work Plans
description: Manage and review F1 work plans from ERR App submissions and direct uploads

direct_upload.title: Upload F1 Work Plan
direct_upload.description: Upload pre-vetted F1 work plans directly

grant_details.no_allocation: No allocation available for this state

explainer_intro: ✨ Use this page to review work plans submitted through the ERR app, upload or enter plans directly, and see how funding lines up against the grant pool.
explainer_no_view: Your account can open this page but cannot view submission lists or upload plans. Ask an administrator if you need access.
explainer_view_only_upload: 🔒 You can review ERR App submissions and pool data. Direct upload and manual entry require upload permission.
explainer_card_allocated: Total distribution allocations included in the pool (same idea as Grant Management).
explainer_card_transferred: Total activity amounts recorded on grant calls.
explainer_card_committed: Locked-in spend: legacy activity imports plus committed budgets from Mutual Aid Portal projects.
explainer_card_pending: Portal project budgets that are assigned or awaiting vetting—not yet committed.
explainer_card_remaining: Balance: transferred − committed − pending (matches the card subtitle).
explainer_pool_same_as_grant: These figures use the same grant-pool logic as the Grant Management page.
explainer_err_app_intro: ERR App projects appear in a tabbed table. Each tab reflects where submissions sit in the review workflow (for example new, feedback, declined, or staging).
explainer_err_app_detail: Open a row to review a project and take the next steps your role allows—such as feedback, approval, or handing work off toward F2.
explainer_direct_upload: Direct Upload: pick state, room, donor, grant/cycle, then upload an F1 PDF. Extracted fields are reviewed before you submit.
explainer_manual_entry: Manual Entry: enter the same F1 information in a form without uploading a file.
explainer_by_state_intro: Expand the bottom Pool Overview section for a sortable table by Sudan state. Use Refresh to reload figures.
explainer_by_state_col_allocated: Allocated — distribution allocation total for that state.
explainer_by_state_col_historical: Historical — legacy imported activity totals by state.
explainer_by_state_col_committed: Committed — Mutual Aid Portal project budgets with committed funding.
explainer_by_state_col_pending: Pending — portal budgets allocated or awaiting vetting.
explainer_by_state_col_remaining: Remaining — balance after historical, committed, and pending.
explainer_by_state_proposed: Proposed / Remainder may show when staging selections preview how much would move against the pool.
explainer_state_filter: 🔒 If your account is limited to certain states, only those states appear.
explainer_sources: Pool totals combine distribution allocations, grant records, Mutual Aid Portal project budgets, and historical activity imports—like Grant Management. ERR App rows are field submissions (the list excludes portal-only duplicates).
